headline: Here's Why Investors Must Hold WM Stock in Their Portfolios Now
summary: WM gains 3.4% in six months as 2026 & 2027 revenue and earnings estimates rise, yet modest growth and liquidity risks still loom.

headline: The Tech That Could Turn Plastic Waste Into a Trillion Dollar Opportunity
summary: A breakthrough depolymerization technology is transforming plastic waste into their base chemical building blocks, offering a scalable alternative to traditional recycling with strong unit economics.
